description: The umbrella crate (secretx/src/lib.rs) has no tpm2-specific dispatch test. Other feature-gated backends like aws-kms, local-signing, k8s, and wolfhsm have #[cfg(feature)] tests that verify from_uri, from_signing_uri, and from_uri_writable route correctly. tpm2 is missing all three. Since tpm2 registers as BackendRegistration, WritableBackendRegistration, AND SigningBackendRegistration, there should be at minimum: (1) from_uri('secretx:tpm2:nv/0x01000001') dispatches, (2) from_uri_writable('secretx:tpm2:nv/0x01000001') dispatches, (3) from_signing_uri('secretx:tpm2:key/0x81000001') dispatches. These are construction-only tests (no TPM hardware needed) and can run in CI.
title: Umbrella tests lack tpm2 dispatch coverage
